Athletics Championship 3D Track & Field Game
赞助内容
Hey Athletes! 👋🏻

The track is officially open! We are thrilled to announce that Women’s disciplines are LIVE in Athletics Championship with our massive new update! 🔥

After months of hard work, we’ve brought a full parallel women’s side to the game—featuring separate cards, personal bests, milestones, and competitive events.

What’s new in this massive update:
✨ Women’s Athletics: 57 new Women’s cards, 19 new disciplines (including relays & Heptathlon), and fully integrated tournament support.
📈 Double the Trophies: Master both sides to climb the ranks twice as fast!
💰 Economy Boost: Higher coin rewards from boxes/tournaments, increased Money Bank (100k!), and better daily limits.
🏟️ 10 Brand New Stadiums: New challenges await after Stadium 25.
🃏 Card Tokens & Merchant: Use our brand-new currency for duplicate cards to trade for the exact athletes you need.
👤 Profile Rework: New achievements, nameplates, and detailed player info.

Get ready to build your dream team, chase new records, and dominate the track like never before! The future of Athletics Championship just got a whole lot bigger. 🌍

See you on the track! 🏃🏻

#athleticschampionship #trackandfield #newrelease #newupdate #mobilegame
Athletics Championship 3D Track & Field Game

查看广告详情
Chris Barlow
赞助内容
Four bedrooms for rent including:

- $545 for bedroom available now.

- $665 for bedroom available now.

- $665 for bedroom available now.

- $995 for Master Bedroom available now that is 3 TIMES LARGER than all other bedrooms - It's enormous - with reserved garage parking spot with smartphone garage door control, private en-suite full master bathroom with $400 heated bidet, a deep walk-in closet with private mini fridge and microwave, vaulted ceilings, Bay windows, ceiling fan, and blackout curtains.

All bedrooms include Bluetooth auto-locking fingerprint bedroom door lock with phone unlocking (as seen in the photos) for quick re-entry by simply touching the lock and smart dimming lights via iOS, Android, Amazon Alexa, Google Home etc.

Fully-Furnished with luxurious and beautiful leather sectional power recliners enough to seat 18 people comfortably, hard wood furniture and TV stands, and a 75" 4k OLED TV + 75" LED TV all worth $13,000. Move-in ready with decorated common areas. EVERYTHING seen in photos is INCLUDED.

* Quiet and centrally located within minutes of 4 freeway exits and TRAX Midvale Center Station, 3 min from 7 parks, within 3 blocks from 3 schools, 1 block from 24-hour 7-11 and Harmon's, and within only 3-6 minutes from 2 Walmarts, Target, WinCo, Fort Union, new Momentum climbing + yoga gym @ 7220 Union Park Ave, VASA Gym, Quarry Bend, Trader Joe's, Smith's, Harmon's, 2 Dollar Trees, In-N-Out, Cafe Rio, Five Guys, Chick-fil-A, Raising Cane's, Chipotle, Jersey Mike's, Jimmy John's, The Pie, McDonald's, Wendy's, Home Depot, Lowes, Gardner Village, Wheeler Farm, and Fashion Place Mall.

* 2 full-sized kitchens each with smart LiDAR robot mop+vacuum with self-emptying self-cleaning base station (clean entire house with the press of a button on the robot or from your phone), side-by-side refrigerator w/ ice maker and cold water dispenser, smart wi-fi dishwasher, ceramic stovetop oven, garbage disposal, and microwave in each of the two kitchens.

* 3 separate Power-Reclining genuine leather sofas with 18 total reclining seats, 75-inch 4k TV, 75-inch 4k TV, 55-inch 4k TV, motorized wood standing desk with 49" Samsung Odyssey G9 ultrawide monitor and M4 Mac Mini Pro and laptop docking station, motorized glass-top standing desk, two hardwood media centers etc. spanning three separate living rooms.

* FREE Netflix-like media server full of 1,000s of movies and TV shows playable from anywhere in the world on any device with the "Plex" or "Jellyfin" app like iOS, Android, laptops etc.

* Theater and party room with huge 10-person power-reclining leather sectional, giant 75-inch 4k TV, smartphone/Alexa-controlled dimmable lights, 5.1 surround sound, smartphone-controlled instant-on gas fireplace, and wetbar with mini-fridge for parties and drinks.

* Google Fiber internet access at 1 Gb, 2 Gb, or 5 Gb download speeds (all with 1 Gb upload speed with unlimited data included). Stream 8k video to any room in the house to up to 35 devices simultaneously without lag, double the quality of 4k.

* Digital key-less entry auto-locking deadbolts on all entry doors (front, rear, and garage) and alarm for the utmost level of security, all while using the same coin-sized digital sticker to place on your smartphone, wallet, car key, or anywhere most convenient for you so you always have your house keys with you.

* Two self-emptying self-cleaning "Roidmi EVA" robot mop+vacuum (on both floors) with LiDAR, smartphone app control, dual rotating mops, and base station dock with 2x 4-liter clean & dirty water tanks, and 3-liter dust collection so it only needs to be emptied every two months. Simply tap the start button with your toe on both robots before you leave the house and the entire home's floors will be completely mopped and vacuumed in every room before you arrive home. Search "Hosico Mop" on YouTube to see it working its magic

* Smart 2k 1920p video doorbell with facial recognition so you can see and speak with anyone at the door from anywhere in the world, and be notified to someone's presence as they approach the house.

* 4 x HD Fisheye Outdoor Security Cameras with 6-week camera footage storage so you can securely see who's at the front door or anywhere outside at anytime via smartphone, tablet, PC, laptop, or even game console.

* Smartphone-controlled instant-on gas fireplaces in every living room and theater room. Set the mood without needing to move.

* Nest smart learning Wifi thermostat with portable temperature sensor pods so you can always experience the perfect room temperature without getting up, saving you money by learning your temperature preferences, switching to economy mode when you're not home, and automatically builds its schedule around yours. Take the portable temperature sensors anywhere with you and schedule it to switch between your bedroom and living room sensors.

* Brand new 2024 smart LG Wifi Washer and Dryer included in laundry with artificial intelligence. (LG models WM4000HBA + DLEX4000B)

* Wireless Wifi laser printer/scanner/copier with automatic document feeder included on every floor (Brother MFCL2750DW).

* All lawn and snow care equipment included like snow blower, pressure washer, edger, weed wacker, 40V battery-powered self-propelled lawn mower, leaf blower and vacuum, wheelbarrow, shovels, rakes etc.

* Smart Wifi Automatic Sprinkler System which automatically adjusts watering depending on the weather to use the minimal amount of water to save you money. All controlled from your smartphone so you can check the watering history, adjust the watering times, manually water individual zones, and test for broken sprinkler heads from anywhere using your smartphone (Orbit B-Hyve 57950).

* Firepit on the back yard patio for s'mores, hotdog-roasting, and bonfires.

* Giant Gas Grill for BBQs.

* Dimming lights on every light switch with some also remote-controlled.

* Bidet on every toilet to save you tons of money on toilet paper.

* Sound-resistant walls and floors.

* Vaulted Ceilings with ceiling fans and recessed lighting.

* Vegetable Gardens with automatic sprinkler system.

* 2-car Garage with the quietest smart Wifi garage door opener on the market, utility sink, ceiling storage racks, wall storage for all yard equipment, and rolling storage shelving.
